start: ^Press Personnel: Another school year, another busy time. Greetings. How can I help you?
cnt1: ^You: Hello, I am here to get an ID.
po1: ^Press Personnel: Oh, are you a new student here? You’ve come to the right place then.
cnt2: ^You: Yes sir. What are the things I need to get one?
po2: ^Press Personnel: You need to present the requirements. For students, the most important is your Certificate of Registration or COR which serves as a proof that you’re enrolled in this University.
cnt3: ^You: I got my COR here, ma’am/sir. I always bring it with me ever since I got enrolled here.
cnt4: ^Press Personnel: Great! Then you need to fill out this I.D. Application form and let’s proceed with getting you and I.D.
po3: ^You: Thank you, sir. I will be on it right away.
